pulse: Donald crowned himself captain at breakfast. Vladimir quietly refused. Bibi offered rotation. By mid-morning, five men and one stove began their cold arithmetic.
scene: In the galley at dawn, Donald declared himself captain; Vladimir answered that the cold, not Donald, was the only authority aboard. By mid-morning, all five scattered: McGregor to the ice to fish alone, Vladimir back to the frozen deck, Jinping to his lounge, and Bibi scribbling the rules nobody yet agreed to.
